zh.lifeSummary: Maria Fernández de Caviedes是Fernando de Caviedes和María Díaz de Ceballos的女兒，於1256年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多。她於1275年與Ruy González de Ceballos在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1298年在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Maria Fernández de Caviedes是Fernando de Caviedes和María Díaz de Ceballos的女儿，于1256年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多。她于1275年与Ruy González de Ceballos在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1298年在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Fernández
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Carlos, Luis, Jorge, Miguel, Fernando, Mario, Jesus, Pedro, Francisco.  Portuguese Ligia, Joao, Armanda, Godofredo, Wenceslao.

Spanish (Fernández): patronymic from the personal name Fernando . The surname (and to a lesser extent the variant Hernandez ) has also been established in southern Italy, mainly in Naples and Palermo, since the period of Spanish dominance there.

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the name in 1 above at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some Jewish descendants retained the surname that their families had adopted as Roman Catholics.

variants.name: Fernando
meanings: A modern form of the old Spanish name Ferdinando, which is of Germanic (Visigothic) origin, from farð ‘journey’ (or possibly an altered form of frið ‘peace’) + nand ‘ready, prepared’. The name was hereditary in the royal families of Spain from an early date. It was borne by Ferdinand I ( d. 1065 ) of Castile and Leon, who conducted successful campaigns against the Moors, and by his descendant Ferdinand V ( 1452–1516 ), who finally expelled the Moors from Spain altogether; he also gave financial backing to Columbus. Through the marriage in 1496 of his daughter Joan the Mad of Castile to the Habsburg Archduke Philip , the name Ferdinand also became hereditary in the Austrian imperial family. Their younger son, Ferdinand ( 1503–64 ), acquired the succession to the kingdoms of Hungary and Bohemia by marriage in 1521 , and became Holy Roman Emperor in 1558 . See Ferdinand .

en.lifeSummary: Maria Fernández de Caviedes was born in 1256, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain as the daughter of Fernando de Caviedes and María Díaz de Ceballos. She married Ruy González de Ceballos in 1275, in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1298, in Sevilla, Andalusia, Spain, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Maria Fernández de Caviedes est née en 1256, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, fille de Fernando de Caviedes et María Díaz de Ceballos. Elle a épousé Ruy González de Ceballos en 1275, à Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1298, à Sevilla, Andalucía, Espagne, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Maria Fernández de Caviedes wurde 1256 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien, als Tochter von Fernando de Caviedes und María Díaz de Ceballos geboren. Sie hat 1275 in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien Ruy González de Ceballos geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1298 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Sevilla, Andalucía, Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Maria Fernández de Caviedes è nata il nel 1256 nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna come figlia di Fernando de Caviedes e María Díaz de Ceballos. Lei sposato Ruy González de Ceballos nel 1275, nel Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1298, nel Sevilla, Andalucía, Spagna, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maria Fernández de Caviedesは1256年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドでFernando de CaviedesとMaría Díaz de Ceballosの娘として生まれた。1275年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドトーレドでRuy González de Ceballosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1298年にスペインアンダルクiアセヴィラで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria Fernández de Caviedes(은)는 1256년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 Fernando de Caviedes(와)과 María Díaz de Ceballos의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1275년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도 톨도에서 Ruy González de Ceballos(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1298년 스페인 앤다루ci아 세비라에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Maria Fernández de Caviedes nasceu em 1256, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha filha de Fernando de Caviedes e María Díaz de Ceballos. Ela casou-se com Ruy González de Ceballos em 1275, em Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1298, em Sevilla, Andaluzia, Espanha, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Maria Fernández de Caviedes родилась в 1256 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. Её родителей звали Fernando de Caviedes и María Díaz de Ceballos. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ruy González de Ceballos в 1275 г. в местности толедо, толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1298 г. в местности севилла, андалукiа, Испания в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Maria Fernández de Caviedes nació en 1256, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España como hija de Fernando de Caviedes y María Díaz de Ceballos. Se casó con Ruy González de Ceballos en 1275, en Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1298, en Sevilla, Andalucía, España, a la edad de 42 años.
